title: Tender Tasty British Chicken Kebabs
description: A kid-friendly British dish featuring lemongrass and halal-friendly ingredients, perfect for a family dinner. The combination of earthy and aerated flavors makes it a unique and tasty meal.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
In a small bowl, mix together yogurt and lemon juice.
Brush the yogurt mixture onto the kebabs during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with bruised lemongrass and your choice of sides.
